name: Skyla
description:
Normally a cargo plane pilot, this Gym Leader flies through the sky with her Pokémon. Her cheery personality has earned her many fans.

Full name: Skyla Highsoar

Age: 20

Height: 176 cm

Hobbies: Going to many places and regions with her plane.

Pokemon team: Swanna, Swoobat, Female Unfezant, Skarmory, Braviary and Mandibuzz

Battle gimmicks: None

Best friends: Elesa
creator: Ice Pokémon Trainer
